title: LLB Jobs 2026 – Young Professional
shortInfo: Staff Selection Commission Western Region (SSC WR) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Young Professional (Legal Consultant). Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-04-2026, and closes on 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SSC WR official website ssc.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: SSC WR Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Staff Selection Commission Western Region (SSC WR) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Young Professional (Legal Consultant). Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 13-04-2026, and closes on 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SSC WR official website ssc.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Law from National Law School of India University (NLSIU) or other Law Schools and Colleges of the Country equivalent in length and intensity with a minimum of 60% marks
qualification.details: Graduate Degree in Law from National Law School of India University (NLSIU) or other Law Schools and Colleges of the Country equivalent in length and intensity with a minimum of 60% marks.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the SSC WR Young Professional (Legal Consultant) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 31st May 2026. Ensure your email application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree in Law from NLSIU or equivalent institutions with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Young Professional (Legal Consultant) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 32 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Young Professional (Legal Consultant) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

faq.question: How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email with all required documents attached. Specific email address details are in the official notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Young Professional (Legal Consultant).

faq.question: What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Where is the office of SSC WR located?
faq.answer: The Staff Selection Commission Western Region is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400020.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page by clicking the provided link.
